three_layer_architecture.basis: Evolved through 4+ rounds of developer pushback. Architecture is sound. Production hardening items addressed.

state_machine_design.basis: REQUESTED -> CONTRACT_LOCKED -> IMPLEMENTED -> VERIFIED -> ACCEPTED is proven pattern from OpenClaw and Anthropic's own agent harness.

builder_verifier_separation.basis: Core principle from Anthropic paper. Evaluator cannot read builder's code. Uses tools to test live output.

model_profiles_opus.basis: Extensive direct experience across all managed systems

model_profiles_codex.basis: 11 failure patterns documented. Need more production validation.

model_profiles_minimax.basis: 12 failure patterns documented from browser automation use.

model_profiles_gemma.basis: 6 failure patterns with proven compensations. Optimal parameters discovered empirically.
model_profiles_gemma.validated_by: PCW production use across 14 content modules

harness_scripts.basis: Fully designed but NOT YET BUILT. Zero production runs. Scripts exist as specifications only.
harness_scripts.validated_by: Design review only — no execution evidence

telegram_bridge.basis: Designed but not implemented. Optional component.

enforcement_mechanisms.basis: Principles are solid (hard > soft). Specific implementations need testing.

protocol_fidelity.basis: 5 mechanisms designed. Phase re-injection and known-fix injection patterns are from proven systems. Calibration gate is from Anthropic.
protocol_fidelity.validated_by: Design + external validation from Anthropic paper

failure_modes.basis: 10 failure modes comprehensively documented with fixes. Original 5 from first principles. Gaps 6-10 from developer + Anthropic paper.
failure_modes.validated_by: First principles analysis + Anthropic paper + developer critique
